nd_7593035438147898646.desc: Things I will never agree with as a runner: PBs don’t count unless it’s in a race, a fast 5k is more impressive than completing a marathon or ultramarathon, and any pace above 7 min/km is walking.  #runtok #running #runner #marathontraining

nd_7593379209603599638.desc: 5 controversial things I say no to as a runner: I’ll never do a hyrox, I won’t run in carbon shoes, I’ll skip parkrun, I won’t take immodium and I’ll never pace shame another runner. #running #runtok #runner #marathontraining

nd_7596058406226726146.desc: 5 things I don’t buy as a runner. Carbon plated shoes, supplements, expensive running watches, race photos, and nasal strips. nd_7636871837795749142.desc: Unhinged rules I have as a runner that somehow make total sense. nd_7594509886042475798.desc: Let me change your perspective on going from a half marathon to a full marathon. Suddenly, it feels achievable.
